S.FORM: bnkis balay nanu' e..,nanu' nanu' wal nha sbilan, ke balay Tayal, spkayal raral ga, cyux pi?
S.PHON: β~vnkis β~valaj nanuʔ e..,nanuʔ nanuʔ wal nħa sβ~vilan, ke β~valaj tajal, spkajal raral ɣa, ʦjux pi?
S.FORM: bnkis balay nanu' e..,nanu' nanu' wal nha sbilan, ke balay Tayal, spkayal raral ga, cyux pi?
S.PHON: βnkis~ɕ βalaj nanuʔ e..,nanuʔ nanuʔ wal nħa s~ɕβilan, ke βalaj tajal, s~ɕpkajal raral ɣa, ʦ~ʨjux pi?

S.FORM: cyux ga. cyux gaga tayal gaga ini ga.
S.PHON: ʦjux ɣa. ʦjux ɣaɣa tajal ɣaɣa ini ɣa.
S.FORM: cyux ga. cyux gaga tayal gaga ini ga.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨjux ɣa. ʦ~ʨjux ɣaɣa tajal ɣaɣa ini ɣa.

S.FORM: laxi piyux iyal kmayal ki,. sazing lahuy ga. aw sazing lahuy. aring na
S.PHON: laxi pijux ijal kmajal ki,. saziŋ laħuj ɣa. aw saziŋ laħuj. ariŋ na
S.FORM: laxi piyux iyal kmayal ki,. sazing lahuy ga. aw sazing lahuy. aring na
S.PHON: laxi pijux ijal kmajal ki,. s~ɕaziŋ laħuj ɣa. aw s~ɕaziŋ laħuj. ariŋ na

S.FORM: pucing rgyax. aw. qutux ga cinbwanan. cinbwanan. aw!
S.PHON: puʦiŋ rɣjax. aw. qutux ɣa ʦinβ~vwanan. ʦinβ~vwanan. aw!
S.FORM: pucing rgyax. aw. qutux ga cinbwanan. cinbwanan. aw!
S.PHON: puʦ~ʨiŋ rɣjax. aw. qutux ɣa ʦ~ʨinβwanan. ʦ~ʨinβwanan. aw!

S.FORM: qutux rgyax hiya ga ne,
S.PHON: qutux rɣjax ħija ɣa ne,
S.FORM: qutux rgyax hiya ga ne,
S.PHON: qutux rɣjax ħija ɣa ne,

S.FORM: yaw nqa Sqoyaw ru sami ru Skikun ga, rgyax ga
S.PHON: jaw nqa sqojaw ru sami ru skikun ɣa, rɣjax ɣa
S.FORM: yaw nqa Sqoyaw ru sami ru Skikun ga, rgyax ga
S.PHON: jaw nqa s~ɕqojaw ru s~ɕami ru s~ɕkikun ɣa, rɣjax ɣa

S.FORM: wal lmon qmasuw bnkis. m..
S.PHON: wal lmon qmas~ɕuw βnkis~ɕ. m..

S.FORM: rgyax qani ru...kzi qasa ga sami,
S.PHON: rɣjax qani ru...kzi qas~ɕa ɣa s~ɕami,

S.FORM: qasa ga simu, qasa qasa...

S.FORM: musa simu i..

S.FORM: qmalup ga 'ta hmci' qmalup qyunan lasa hiya..
S.PHON: qmalup ɣa ʔta ħmʦiʔ qmalup qjunan lasa ħija..
S.FORM: qmalup ga 'ta hmci' qmalup qyunan lasa hiya..
S.PHON: qmalup ɣa ʔta ħmʦ~ʨiʔ qmalup qjunan las~ɕa ħija..

S.FORM: hminas kya cyux nha kyapun ga ne, waha balay si laxi kya.
S.PHON: ħminas kja ʦjux nħa kjapun ɣa ne, waħa β~valaj si laxi kja.
S.FORM: hminas kya cyux nha kyapun ga ne, waha balay si laxi kya.
S.PHON: ħminas~ɕ kja ʦ~ʨjux nħa kjapun ɣa ne, waħa βalaj s~ɕi laxi kja.

S.FORM: skay kya ruw ne, pngani' ru wahiy matu' qyunan qutux i..
S.PHON: skaj kja ruw ne, pŋaniʔ ru waħij matuʔ qjunan qutux i..
S.FORM: skay kya ruw ne, pngani' ru wahiy matu' qyunan qutux i..
S.PHON: s~ɕkaj kja ruw ne, pŋaniʔ ru waħij matuʔ qjunan qutux i..

S.FORM: yaw nqason mha i musa mlata' qani ga, cyux qutux
S.PHON: jaw nqason mħa i musa mlataʔ qani ɣa, ʦjux qutux
S.FORM: yaw nqason mha i musa mlata' qani ga, cyux qutux

S.FORM: yaw na son mha i..gaga na binkgan bnkis qasa, cyx qutux son mha i
S.PHON: jaw na son mħa i..ɣaɣa na β~vinkɣan β~vnkis qasa, ʦjx qutux son mħa i

S.PHON: jaw na s~ɕon mħa i..ɣaɣa na βinkɣan βnkis~ɕ qas~ɕa, ʦ~ʨjx qutux s~ɕon mħa i

S.FORM: qalang qalang myan Skikun ga cyux qes nha lasa uzi..

S.PHON: qalaŋ qalaŋ mjan s~ɕkikun ɣa ʦ~ʨjux qes~ɕ nħa las~ɕa uzi..
